typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-gray-900
typography.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900

animations.floating_blobs: Implement highly blurred (blur-3xl) absolute divs with gradient backgrounds behind the glassmorphic cards. Use framer-motion to slowly translate (x, y) and scale these blobs for an organic, breathing liquid glass effect.
animations.glowing_button: relative overflow-hidden group hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300

media.trusted_by_logos: Use react-icons/si (e.g., SiStripe, SiGoogle, SiMeta, SiAmazon, SiMicrosoft, SiVercel) with className='text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors text-4xl'
media.ai_agents_avatars: Do NOT use human photos. Use beautifully styled glowing circular <div> elements containing specific lucide-react icons (e.g., Bot, LineChart, Megaphone, Search, Zap) to represent the 10 AI Agents.

sections_instructions.Navbar: Sticky, transparent at top, transition to glassmorphic white on scroll. Structure: Logo (left), Links (center), 'Get Started' glowing button (right).
sections_instructions.Hero: Two-column. Left: H1 with gradient text span (bg-clip-text text-transparent), Subtitle, Primary & Secondary CTA. Right: Abstract interactive Dashboard Mockup built with HTML/Tailwind, animated floating elements. Background: Pure white with 2-3 massive, highly blurred, slowly moving colored blobs.
sections_instructions.TrustedBy: Minimalist grayscale logo strip. Use flex flex-wrap or simple marquee.
sections_instructions.Features: 12 cards in a Bento Grid. Each card uses glassmorphism and features a unique accent color blob behind the icon. Add hover lift and border shimmer.
sections_instructions.Solutions: 6 cards focused on target audiences (Startups, VCs, etc.). Keep ultra minimal. Large subtle typography or numbers in background.
sections_instructions.WorkflowTimeline: Horizontal or Vertical timeline. Use framer-motion SVG line drawing to animate the path between nodes (Idea -> Launch).
sections_instructions.AIAgents: Grid or interactive slider of 10 agent cards. Each has a glowing icon avatar, name, and specialization tag.
sections_instructions.DashboardPreview: Showcase the 'Platform'. Build a mockup UI using Shadcn-like structure (Sidebar, Center panel, Right stats). Integrate animated metric counters using framer-motion.
sections_instructions.Metrics: Section with 3-4 large numbers. Use framer-motion for counting up effect.
sections_instructions.Testimonials: Carousel or multi-column grid of glassmorphic cards. Include star ratings, avatar, name, and quote.
sections_instructions.Pricing: Monthly/Yearly toggle. 4 tiers (Starter, Pro, Business, Enterprise). Apply a glowing gradient border to the 'Pro' or 'Business' tier to highlight it.
sections_instructions.FAQ: Accordion using Shadcn UI. Keep borders thin and touch targets large. Minimalist styling.
sections_instructions.Blog: 3 cards. Top image, minimal meta tags, clean typography.
sections_instructions.Newsletter: Large glassmorphic banner section. Input field and submit button.
sections_instructions.Footer: Clean 4-column layout. Light gray text, simple copyright.
sections_instructions.ChatWidget: Fixed bottom-right corner. A circular glowing button (using Primary or Accent color) that toggles a mock Chat window powered by Gemini UI vibes.

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, accordion triggers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="hero-cta-button"').

general_instructions_for_agent: Strictly adhere to the Apple-inspired minimalism: huge white space, thin borders, soft shadows, and high-quality typography. DO NOT use generic gray backgrounds; keep the main background pure white (#FFFFFF) and use colorful, highly blurred background div blobs (blur-[100px] opacity-20) behind the glassmorphism cards to inject the requested brand gradients. Ensure all 24px border radii are respected. Use lucide-react for UI icons.
